title: Inspection report on Home Office country of origin information on Turkey and Vietnam (February 2025)
body: "On 4 September 2024, the Independent Advisory Group on Country Information (IACGI) sought tenders for reviews of selected Home Office country of origin information (COI) on Turkey and Vietnam. The call for tenders invited qualified experts to submit expressions of interest in reviewing selected recent Home Office country policy and information notes (CPINs), as well as a selection of country of origin information request (COIR) responses (produced by the Home Office to address specific queries from caseworkers), on conditions in the two countries. "

taxons.title: Inspections of border, immigration and asylum services
